name: Ahrens Park
description: Ahrens Park is a place to play pickleball in Grinnell, IA. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Grinnell Athletic and Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Grinnell Athletic and Recreation Center in Grinnell, IA! There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Grinnell College Tennis Courts
description: Grinnell College Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grinnell, IA. There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net.

name: Van Horn Park
description: Come play pickleball at Van Horn Park in Grinnell, IA! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
